data.title: ROC has been ranked as the top American facial recognition provider in NIST FRTE, achieving top global marks for accuracy and speed.
data.description: In Denver on September 25, 2025, ROC, a US-based company specializing in multimodal biometrics and Vision AI, unveiled their newest face recognition algorithm which has been recognized as one of the most precise and reliable globally. This recognition comes from the recent NIST Face Recognition Vendor Test (FRTE). The algorithm's outstanding accuracy and consistency in the test solidify ROC's position as a top player in the field of biometrics and AI technology.

data.title: Urban Air Adventure Park to expand in California with 5 new franchise agreements, planning to add 7 parks in the state.
data.description: A renowned operator of indoor adventure parks, Urban Air Adventure Park, is set to expand its presence in California by adding seven new parks. The company, known as the world's largest indoor adventure park operator and a key player in the youth enrichment sector, is aiming to further grow its footprint in the state. This development signifies a significant investment in the region and underscores Urban Air Adventure Park’s commitment to providing thrilling and engaging experiences for visitors. The expansion in California reflects the company's strategic approach to catering to the ever-growing demand for recreational activities, with the potential to attract a large number of adventure enthusiasts.

data.title: NYSE provides daily pre-market update; President of South Korea rings Opening Bell. Ashley Mastronardi delivers update.
data.description: Today in New York on September 25, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) shared its daily pre-market report from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can now access the latest NYSE Pre-market update for valuable market insights before the trading day commences. Ashley Mastronardi is responsible for delivering this crucial pre-market update, making it an essential resource for investors looking to stay ahead in the market.

data.title: Venture Valley Business Tycoon named "Best of Back to School 2025" for Secondary Education by Tech & Learning Awards. Game is CODiE Awards Finalist for "Best Educational Game" in categories for grades 9-12.
data.description: Venture Valley, developed by Singleton Foundation for Financial Literacy and Entrepreneurship, has been selected as a finalist for the "Best Educational Game" category in the prestigious CODiE Awards. The game is available for free on PC through Steam and on mobile devices running iOS. This recognition comes as a testament to the success of Venture Valley in providing educational value to players. The awards ceremony will take place in Pasadena, California on September 25, 2025.

data.title: Club Pilates holds largest 80s Week Event across the US & Canada, inviting community to celebrate from Sept 25 to Oct 10.
data.description: In Irvine, California, Club Pilates studios nationwide are gearing up for their annual 80s Week Event in September. This year, the celebration will be bigger than ever, with participants from the U.S. and Canada joining in. The event, running from September 25th to October 10th, will feature neon lights and high-energy music, creating the largest Pilates throwback celebration yet. Members, instructors, and Pilates fans can join in the festivities at locations across both countries.

data.title: Global digital surgery devices market is projected to reach $12.13 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 15.3% till 2029. Leading companies hold 83.9% market share.
data.description: A new report titled "Digital Surgery Devices Market, Global, 2024-2029" is now available for purchase on ResearchAndMarkets.com. According to the report, the revenue forecast for the base year 2024 stands at $12.13 billion, and a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 15.3% is expected during the period from 2024 to 2029. The market for digital surgery devices includes advanced technologies like artificial intelligence (AI), robotic-assisted systems, augmented reality (AR), virtual reality (VR), and intraoperative imaging, aiming to revolutionize the field.

data.title: MITER Foundation renews partnership with Homes For Our Troops for 3 more years, celebrating 10-year collaboration.
data.description: MITER Foundation, the charitable arm of residential window and door manufacturer MITER Brands, has revealed its 10-year collaboration with Homes For Our Troops and has decided to extend this partnership for an additional three years. Homes for Our Troops, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization, constructs and gives custom homes to severely injured post-9/11 Veterans, aiding them in rebuilding their lives. The partnership between MITER Foundation and Homes for Our Troops has been significant in supporting Veterans, and with this renewal, the commitment is solidified for the next three years.

data.title: Bear Icebox Communications named a finalist for B2B Campaign of the Year at the 2025 PRNews Platinum PR Awards. Recognition among industry giants.
data.description: A small agency based in Chicago, Bear Icebox Communications, has been recognized as a Finalist for B2B Campaign of the Year in the 2025 Platinum PR Awards by PRNEWS. This nomination highlights their exceptional campaign in a field dominated by industry giants. The agency's achievement was acknowledged following a surge in nominations, indicating a highly competitive selection process this year.

data.title: AgeTech Connect Summit focuses on Longevity Economy & Future of Work, Customers, and Community. Over 1.4 billion adults over 60 by 2030.
data.description: Registration for a new event focusing on AgeTech's impact on the lives of older adults and related markets is now available at a discounted rate. The event will take place in Atlanta on September 25, 2025. By 2030, the global population of individuals over 60 years old is estimated to hit 1.4 billion, underlining the significance of AgeTech innovations in this demographic.

data.title: Coach Scott Barla of Barla Golf Academy named Golf Digest's No. 1 Teacher in Indiana for 2026-2027.
data.description: Barla Golf Academy in Noblesville, Indiana, has gained recognition for its data-driven player development. On September 25, 2025, the academy revealed that Coach Scott Barla has been honored as Golf Digest's top teacher in Indiana for the 2026–2027 period. This title emphasizes Barla's commitment to employing measurable techniques in enhancing players' skills. This accomplishment highlights the academy's dedication to utilizing data to drive player improvement and solidify its reputation in the golf instruction field.

data.title: Vegalab CEO David Selakovic moderates discussions on agricultural biotechnology at Food Security SummitX Dubai 2025.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware on September 25, 2025, David Selakovic, the Founder and CEO of Vegalab, played a prominent role at the Food Security SummitX in Dubai. He led discussions on the future of agricultural biotechnology and shared insights in various sessions.

data.title: Scalefocus from Sofia, Bulgaria, wins Silver Stevie® Award at 22nd Annual International Business Awards® for Energy Industry Innovation.
data.description: In Sofia, Bulgaria on September 25, 2025, Scalefocus received recognition for its innovative work in the energy sector at the 22nd Annual International Business Awards®. The company was honored with a Silver Stevie® Award in the Energy Industry Innovation of the Year category. This acknowledgment highlights Scalefocus' significant achievements in transforming the energy industry, showcasing their dedication to innovation and excellence in their field.

data.title: Rustic Bakery in Bay Area marks 20th anniversary with culinary events, known for artisanal flatbreads.
data.description: A renowned brand in the Bay Area is uniting culinary experts and collaborators to showcase 'Perfect Bites' in Petaluma, California. Rustic Bakery, famous for its gourmet flatbreads, will mark its 20th anniversary in October, honoring the day it sent out its inaugural shipment. The event will highlight the brand's success over two decades, with an array of  culinary leaders and partners joining to share their expertise.
